description_long: This object is a weathered, cylindrical baseball bat with a slightly uneven surface and visible signs of wear. The bat is primarily a muted, grayish-brown color, with some areas showing discoloration and a prominent dark streak or crack running vertically along one side. The surface appears rough and matte, suggesting it is made of wood that has been exposed to the elements. There are no visible logos, grip tape, or decorative markings, giving it a utilitarian and aged appearance. The ends of the bat are simple and unadorned, with no distinct end cap or additional features.
description: A weathered, grayish-brown wooden baseball bat with a rough, matte surface and visible wear, including a dark vertical streak.
description_view_0: The bat is seen from a slightly angled side, showing a mostly uniform grayish-brown surface with subtle texture.
description_view_1: This view highlights a lighter, almost whitewashed side with a faint vertical discoloration and a hint of a crack.
description_view_2: A prominent dark vertical streak or crack is visible, contrasting with the lighter wood surface.
description_view_3: The bat appears more uniformly colored and cylindrical, with less visible wear or markings compared to other views.
